import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "./PolicyPages.css"; import Footer from "../components/Footer/Footer.tsx"; const PrivacyPolicyPage = () => { return (

Privacy Policy

Last updated: [Date]

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you contact us or schedule an appointment.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to provide our services and communicate with you.

3. Information Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties.

4. Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information.

5. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

← Back to Home
); }; export default PrivacyPolicyPage;
